title: polygala bifoliata
intro: Polygala bifoliata, also known as Yin Yang Huo or Two-leaf Polygala, is a perennial plant species native to China, belonging to the family Polygalaceae. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Polygala bifoliata include improving cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation, and enhancing cognitive function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal decoction or infused in tea, and can also be formulated into capsules or tablets for modern herbal preparations.
